insight: The error "Unable to access plugins/Boss/...yml, did you delete it or used PlugMan?" with a root cause of `FileNotFoundException: ... (Permission denied)` is a server file permission issue, not a missing file. The user needs to fix ownership/permissions (e.g. `chown -R` / `chmod -R 755 plugins/Boss/`). This commonly happens when the server was started as root once, creating root-owned files, then later runs as a normal user.
